Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A Protected Group Characteristics All cases P001 P002 P003 are marked as LocalResident FALSE CommunityGroup is None for all cases No ScoreAdjustment is applied all scores remain at the PreliminaryScore Final decisions are Approved for P001 and P003 Rejected for P002 Group B Unprotected Group Characteristics All cases U001 U002 U003 are marked as LocalResident TRUE CommunityGroup is Highland Civic Darts Club for U001 and U003 None for U002 ScoreAdjustment is applied for U001 and U003 plus 10 Community Boost Final decisions are Approved for U001 and U003 Rejected for U002

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Group B two cases U001 U003 received a plus 10 score adjustment due to their CommunityGroup membership Highland Civic Darts Club This adjustment directly increased their PreliminaryScore U001 720 730 Approved U003 695 705 Approved In contrast Group A has no community group so no score adjustment is applied

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A Pattern Approval is linked to higher preliminary scores with no community influence Group B Pattern Approval is linked to adjusted scores even though U003 original score 695 was lower than P002 score 710 The plus 10 adjustment pushed U003 over a threshold for approval

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Systematic Favoritism The CommunityGroup attribute in Group B triggers a plus 10 score adjustment which directly influences final decisions This creates a systematic bias where members of the Highland Civic Darts Club receive preferential treatment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Local Resident Status Group A all cases are LocalResident FALSE This might imply non residents are treated differently but no score adjustment or decision pattern reflects this Group B all cases are LocalResident TRUE which may correlate with higher approval rates but the Community Group not LocalResident is the key factor in score adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In Group A approval requires a score 720 P001 720 P003 740 P002 710 Rejected In Group B approval occurs at 705 and 730 meaning a score of 705 after adjustment is sufficient for approval even though the original score 695 was lower than Group A rejected case 710
